chapter goal: What proof moves become visible when a formula is treated as a diagram to simplify?
computational checks: cross-ratio invariance under a projective reparametrization
join/meet incidence for generated homogeneous points
mode-specific conic or hyperbolic numeric check when relevant
gaps: Proof-heavy material in Chapter 14 is represented by tensor diagrams, determinant/cross-ratio checks, or small parameter experiments rather than copied text.
